Localization.Description: A file is downloaded from a ProFTPd server

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user from host {src.host} authenticated as "{datafield2}" downloaded file {object.fullpath} from the ProFTPd server on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} is downloading file {object.fullpath} from the ProFTPd server on host {event_src.host}
A user from host {src.host} authenticated as "{datafield2}" is downloading file {object.fullpath} from the ProFTPd server on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} downloaded file {object.fullpath} from the ProFTPd server on host {event_src.host}
